services.title: Residential Roof Replacement
services.description: High-quality replacement systems with dimensional shingles, leak protection, and clean architectural finishes.

services.title: Roof Repair & Leak Response
services.description: Targeted repair services for storm damage, flashing issues, and active leaks with rapid turnaround.

services.title: Commercial Roofing
services.description: Flat and low-slope roofing solutions built for durability, drainage performance, and lower maintenance.

services.title: Preventive Roof Maintenance
services.description: Proactive inspections and maintenance programs that extend roof life and reduce emergency costs.

portfolio.title: Premium Asphalt Roof Transformation
portfolio.summary: Replaced aging roof with weather-resistant architectural shingles and upgraded ventilation.
portfolio.alt: Large suburban house with new premium asphalt shingle roof

portfolio.title: Luxury Metal Roofing Installation
portfolio.summary: Installed standing seam metal roof for sleek aesthetics and long-term resilience.
portfolio.alt: Modern home featuring a standing seam metal roof

portfolio.title: Commercial Flat Roof Retrofit
portfolio.summary: Full membrane retrofit and drainage optimization for a commercial facility.
portfolio.alt: Commercial building with a newly installed flat roof system

testimonials.quote: Excellent communication and flawless craftsmanship. The roof changed the look of our whole home.
testimonials.author: Melissa G.

testimonials.quote: Basile Contractors delivered ahead of schedule and kept our business operations running smoothly.
testimonials.author: R. Thompson

testimonials.quote: Very professional team, fair pricing, and the cleanup was spotless. Highly recommended.
testimonials.author: Carla M.

faq.question: What roofing materials do you install?
faq.answer: We install architectural shingles, metal roofing systems, and commercial membrane roofing based on your property needs.

faq.question: Do you provide free estimates?
faq.answer: Yes, every project starts with a free estimate and detailed consultation.

faq.question: Are your projects insured and warrantied?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We carry proper insurance and provide workmanship coverage along with manufacturer warranties.
